name: AnniWebsite
description: Personal website + AI life organizer. Built with Vite, vanilla JS, self-hosted. Designed from scratch, no templates.

name: AnniProxy
description: A self-hosted proxy browser backend. Routes and manages web traffic privately — built for people who take their own infrastructure seriously.

name: CZTimers
description: Real-time Star Citizen Executive Hangar cycle tracker. Tracks the 3h 05m RED/GREEN/BLACK phase loop with per-light ETAs and phase countdown.

name: AnniWIn11
description: Windows 11 backup & restore tool. Makes re-installing windows way more bearable.
